Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Crusher]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Crusher is a Blood Shadow with power beyond an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Crusher possesses incredible leg strength and dexterity but lacks a spatial artifact or sacred arts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Crusher's strength is so great that it works on a conceptual level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Crusher's strength can bend the rules of the physical world like Heralds or Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Crusher is the name of Yan Shoumei's Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Crusher is a beast capable of striking Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Crusher tossed Ruby aside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Yan Shoumei did not summon Crusher.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Crusher is a snarling monster of blood.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Crusher made a donation that Lindon used to match Yerin's strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon had once felt a weight of conceptual strength like Crusher.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon gained strength from draining Crusher.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Crusher is an enhanced Shadow belonging to Yan Shoumei.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher is someone Yan Shoumei relies on to take risks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher is a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher is a companion of Yan Shoumei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher is a Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher is composed of more than just madra, carrying stolen willpower and the weight of a dozen unique sacred beasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher carries a sliver of the Strength Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher is an old friend of the purple spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — Crusher resides in the depths of Yan Shoumei's soul.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
